setups.name: pullback_continuation
setups.short_description: Entry on pullback into trend continuation zone after momentum confirmation.
setups.entry_logic: Wait for directional trend, identify pullback to key level, enter on confirmation candle.
setups.invalidation_logic: Invalid if price closes beyond structure level opposite to trend before entry triggers.

setups.name: false_breakout_reversal
setups.short_description: Fade failed breakout when price reclaims prior range.
setups.entry_logic: Detect breakout sweep, confirm rejection and re-entry into range, enter toward opposite side.
setups.invalidation_logic: Invalid if price accepts beyond breakout level with continuation volume.

setups.name: breakout_retest
setups.short_description: Trade continuation after breakout and clean retest of broken level.
setups.entry_logic: Wait for breakout from consolidation, then retest hold of breakout level and trigger candle.
setups.invalidation_logic: Invalid if retest fails and price closes back inside consolidation range.
